full_text:
Li Dian (Mancheng) 李典 (曼成)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Dian (李典), styledMancheng (曼成), was born in Juye County, Shanyang Commandery (Presently Juye in Shandong Province). Served Wei. Assisted Zhang Liao in the defense of Hefei. Li Dian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Dian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
